instruction:
The graph of $g(x)$ contains the point $(-3,6)$. Write a formula for a translation of $g$ whose graph contains the point:
(a) (-4, 6) $y=$ [ANS]
(b) (-3, 10) $y=$ [ANS]
(Note: Your answers should be an equation which is entered in function notation, meaning you should be entering a formula of the form $y=g(x-215)+45$.)
